page_metadata.biotools__summary: Extension of the short read analysis pipeline SHORE. SHOREmap supports genome-wide genotyping and candidate-gene sequencing in a single step through analysis of deep sequencing data from a large pool of recombinants.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Extension of the short read analysis pipeline SHORE. SHOREmap supports genome-wide genotyping and candidate-gene sequencing in a single step through analysis of deep sequencing data from a large pool of recombinants.
